title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:16307:run:20260402T093119:76288 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/ker...
summary_text: 確認したスクリプト上、`normal` 形（`codex + glm + specialist`、6 lanes）で receipt を健康判定に通すための必須値は次です。 - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV`（3モデル以上） - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT=6` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS=true` - `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS=true` - `write` の `lane_count=6`、`providers_csv=codex,glm,<specialist>`、`mode=normal` 実行コマンド（指定 run / 指定 receipt パスに合わせる形）はこれです。 ```bash export KERNEL_RUN_ID='adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:16307:run:20260402T093119:76288' export KERNEL_STATE_ROOT='/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel' export KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_RECEIPT_DIR='/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap-receipts' export KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV='codex,glm,gemini-cli' export KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT='6' export KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS='true' export KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS='true' bash scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write 6 'codex,glm,gemini-cli' normal 'kernel-bootstrap-sync' ``` 参照: - [kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh):24 - [kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh):54 - [kernel-runtime-health.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh):184 補足として、`runtime-health` は receipt 以外に ledger 上の provider 成功証跡（`codex/glm/specialist` 各 `success_count`）も要求します。
